assertions.notes: The corpus GRE session log (gre-game-session.log) captures 5 GRE boundary lines but the daemon does not yet write per-turn game_plays rows from GRE parse output. The game_plays table exists (migration 000101) and PlaysByMatch works correctly after the ADR-050 fix (PR #659), but there are no rows for the corpus match_id because the daemon's GRE ingest path does not emit game_plays events yet. expected_empty: true — the timeline container renders as empty state (data-testid='game-timeline-empty'), not as a 500 error. A 500 from PlaysByMatch (the ADR-050 regression) would cause the timeline panel to show data-testid='game-timeline-error' instead — FAIL. When the GRE write path lands, regenerate with expected_empty: false and per-turn play assertions.
